project_type: C++17 single-compilation-unit AI system (local hybrid AI OS)
build_system: Makefile with single compilation unit (mk_entry.cpp includes all other .cpp files). clang++/g++, -std=c++17 -O2. Dependencies: libcurl, libsqlite3
test_framework: Custom test framework in tests/test_main.cpp with TEST_ASSERT macros and RUN_TEST macro. 7 tests, 62 assertions currently.
verification_instructions: 1. Run build command and verify zero errors (warnings OK). 2. Run make test and verify all tests pass. 3. Check du -sh for total size stays under 100MB.
snapshot_or_generated_files: MK_OS/bootloader/build_work/ contains .iso and .qcow2 images (46MB). These are not regenerated in sandbox.
setup_instructions: Dependencies (libcurl, libsqlite3) are already available. Just run make in MK_OS/ directory.
environment_constraints: Open internet available. No Docker needed. Build is purely C++17 with libcurl and libsqlite3. The project compiles with 12 warnings but zero errors on current branch.
contribution_requirements: All code changes must compile clean with the single-unit build. Tests must pass. Total project size must stay under 100MB.
key_patterns: Single compilation unit via #include of .cpp files from mk_entry.cpp. Header guards with #ifndef. Modules are classes with init/load/save lifecycle. Knowledge stored in pipe-delimited .mk files (source|relation|target|weight). ANSI color codes for terminal UI. Gen-Z casual tone in personality responses.
directory_structure: MK_OS/ is the main source. ai_core/ has the AI engines (HRE, MCE, CXN, Prometheus, conversation). mk_brain/ has personality, learning, memory. plugins/ has telegram, pc_helper. tools/ has code_runner. system/ has the entry point, shell, services. bootloader/ has boot scripts. knowledge/ has data.
